report.title: e-Surveyor: Conservation Statuses
report.description: Report for a user's species data conservation statuses in e-Surveyor
report.query:
SELECT #columns# FROM cache_occurrences_functional o JOIN cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttl ON cttl.id=o.preferred_taxa_taxon_list_id LEFT JOIN (taxa_taxon_designations ttd JOIN taxon_designations td ON td.id=ttd.taxon_designation_id AND td.category_id IN (7666, 7667) -- GB Status or GB Red List AND td.abbreviation IN ('Extinct', 'Na', 'Nb', 'Notable', 'NR', 'NS', 'RDB 1', 'RDB 2', 'RDB 3', 'RE', 'CR', 'CR(PE)', 'EN', 'NR', 'NT', 'RE', 'VU') JOIN cache_termlists_terms cat ON cat.id=td.category_id
) ON ttd.taxon_id=cttl.taxon_id and ttd.deleted=false WHERE o.survey_id=#survey_id#

column.name: designation
column.sql: case when td.abbreviation is null then 'None' when td.abbreviation='Extinct' then 'Extinct' when td.abbreviation='Na' then 'Notable' when td.abbreviation='Nb' then 'Notable' when td.abbreviation='NR' then 'Nationally Rare' when td.abbreviation='NS' then 'Nationally Scarce' when td.abbreviation='RDB 1' then 'Endangered' when td.abbreviation='RDB 2' then 'Vulnerable' when td.abbreviation='RDB 3' then 'Rare' when td.abbreviation='RE' then 'Regionally Extinct' when td.abbreviation='CR' then 'Critically Endangered' when td.abbreviation='CR(PE)' then 'Critically Endangered' when td.abbreviation='EN' then 'Endangered' when td.abbreviation='NR' then 'Nationally Rare' when td.abbreviation='NT' then 'Near Threatened' when td.abbreviation='RE' then 'Regionally Extinct' when td.abbreviation='VU' then 'Vulnerable' else td.abbreviation end
